description: Style NoteBuilt with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit that athletes demand, these pants come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance trackpants are great for a day out on the field and are designed for sport performance with Dri-Fit technology. Team them with a T-shirt and trainers.Product DetailsBlack trackpants, purple panel on the elastic waistband , nike swoosh on left hip, snug fit at the waist, slight flare below the kneesMaterial and CareBody: 92% polyester, 8% spandex Gusset lining: 100% polyesterMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and fitRegular fit
